identity.name: The Third Son, Overdue
identity.kind: third son, sent to seek his fortune (running late)
identity.story: Youngest of three brothers, sent off with the family's whole store of luck since a story's third son always finds his fortune and the first two never do. His brothers came home inside a season, fortunes in hand. He found this town instead, years back now, and still hasn't decided whether stopping here counts as arriving or only as resting very thoroughly along the way.

relationships.kind: sits for her reading every high sun and hears the same honest 'not yet' — closer, he's decided, to 'not never' each time he asks

behavior.label: the third son's very long errand

child.label: checking the gate road for news that didn't come overnight

children.label: sitting for Morrow's reading, asking if yesterday finally held it
walking back down to the carts
hauling the carts in before anyone has to ask, same as any third son worth his ending

child.label: keeping the crust of blessed bread that hasn't gone stale a day since he left home
